properties.body:
EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
MOROCCO.
WESTERN SAHARA.
DNC 01, DNC 08.
1. GUNNERY EXERCISES 03 SEP THRU 31 DEC
   BETWEEN 270 DEGREES AND 360 DEGREES
   IN AREAS WITHIN 20 MILES OF:
   A. 33-41N 008-03W.
   B. 29-53N 010-15W.
   C. 27-00N 013-50W.
   D. 23-35N 017-00W.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 2632/19.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 01 JAN 20.
